examples: The thieves jumped him in a dark alleyway.
There was another alleyway which came to a dead end just behind the house.
Access was gained to these shops through the small alleyway at the back of the properties—it's dark and as you can imagine, no one saw the thief or thieves in action.
Thankfully, some of Beijing's alleyway architecture is protected these days, with buildings marked by white stone plaques.
The girl told her family a man attacked her as she walked along an alleyway.
